query: SELECT c.id, c.channelNo, c.label, c.instrumentId, i.deviceCode, i.modelType FROM instrumentChannels c JOIN weighingInstruments i ON c.instrumentId = i.id WHERE i.deviceCode = 'c002' ORDER BY c.channelNo;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KBF53B6TGXz9Z1D.root --database SQ6yxhwuwXauyoM9DVdVk2 --execute SELECT c.id, c.channelNo, c.label, c.instrumentId, i.deviceCode, i.modelType FROM instrumentChannels c JOIN weighingInstruments i ON c.instrumentId = i.id WHERE i.deviceCode = 'c002' ORDER BY c.channelNo;
